bullets.text: Authorities in Côte d’Ivoire report 59 deaths due to floods since May, as West Africa experiences torrential rains with Ghana also reporting fatalities and floods affecting Benin, Togo, and Nigeria.
Amnesty International accuses Sudan’s Rapid Support Forces of committing crimes against humanity, including ethnic cleansing, in a systematic campaign against civilians in El Fasher.
A Nasa-funded robot has launched to save a falling space telescope by catching it in mid-orbit and boosting it back to safety before it burns up.
Almost no one is happy with Labor’s gambling crackdown. Albanese may as well do the right thing and get tough.
Doctors almost sent Kris home with a migraine. Then her whole face went numb.
An estimated 55,000 Australians suffer stroke each year, with varying outcomes depending on where they live.
The Canada Pension Plan Investment Board will invest $1.75 billion to support EQT AB's artificial intelligence infrastructure buildout, signifying a major investment in AI technology.
Canada and the Philippines are set to finalize a free trade agreement this year, alongside deepening cooperation in energy, defense, labor, and migration.
Chilean mining companies SQM and Codelco are planning to increase lithium output at their joint venture by over 70%, betting on future battery demand.
